title: Kellerhals Ferguson Kroblin PLLC ransomware incident

extortion.description: Kellerhals Ferguson Kroblin PLLC (KFK) a full service law firm with offices in the U.S. Virgin Islands and New York, New York. KFK clients include investment managers, real estate developers, governments, high-tech manufacturers, e-commerce businesses, commercial tour operators, restaurant proprietors, as well as many large banking and financial institutions.
